arts.ttl: Cole Palmer raves about “very, very, very good” West Ham star
arts.sum: Chelsea attacker Cole Palmer was heavily linked to the move to West Ham United before his move to Stamford Bridge. The Hammers were reportedly very close to securing his signature before Chelsea. arts.ttl: Chelsea in talks with Premier League rivals over THREE players
arts.sum: Chelsea are in talks with Everton over a loan solution for Armando Broja, Carney Chukwuemeka and Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall, according to a report. As a result, the Toffees have now opened talks with Chelsea to find a potential solution to the problem because one of their loanees, Armando Broja, is expected to be sidelined for several months.

arts.ttl: Club have ’emerged victorious’ from ‘exhausting’ Chelsea negotiation – Deal now in the final stretch
arts.sum: Lazio have ‘emerged victorious’ from negotiations with Chelsea and are now set to sign Cesare Casadei from the Blues. That’s according to Calciomercato, who report that an ‘almost exhausting negotiation’ between the two sides has now ended in a positive conclusion. arts.ttl: Chelsea’s Cole Palmer hails ‘crazy’ Barcelona star
arts.sum: Barcelona starlet Lamine Yamal has this weekend come in for fresh praise on the part of one of the Premier League’s leading stars. The player in question? Cole Palmer. Wide-man…

arts.ttl: Guardiola reveals UNEXPECTED star he'd 'LOVE' to keep at Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has once again made it clear that he wants James McAtee to stay at Manchester City . The 22-year-old has found regular minutes hard to come by this season and there have been suggestions that Man City could suffer a repeat of their Cole Palmer blunder.

arts.ttl: Done Deal: Chelsea accept Casadei offer from Lazio
arts.sum: According to Sportitalia, Chelsea have accepted Lazio’s offer for Cesare Casadei, which is worth €12m...

arts.ttl: Manchester City: a $160 million crisis caused by one man
arts.sum: Name Transfer fee (M$) Add-ons (M$) From Omar Marmoush 78.78 5.25 Eintracht Frankfurt Abdukodir Khusanov 42.01 10.5 Lens Vitor Reis 36.76 - Palmeiras Juma Bah* 6.3 - Real Valladolid And there’s more to come, with the official announcement of the controversial signing of 18-year-old Juma Bah from Real Valladolid and the much-anticipated replacement for Rodri Hernández, whose injury has sent City into an unexpected crisis, still pending.
